textByHashes.35be9d71de0fc105d3c8d3eb113d47f7740ea8ee: Zemouregal, this magical mist feels like it's corroding my insides. This seems like a bad idea...
textByHashes.61a9e2847a051e8bdb99bae4b480fede838842e9: Your cousin grows unusually strong. We should consider allying ourselves to him, maybe even combine forces.
textByHashes.8d781af7d8b981bc56ecfe249e623f99a84a83fd: I'm telling you, he may be close to finding it.
textByHashes.c8727ed4d41d61277e3b0dbc75bc6e5636c6aa53: Zemouregal... The forces... What do we do?
textByHashes.88d7c10faf36f262be13a6632b1c9af1aad53e8b: Something's not right... Something's blocking my teleport!
